findings.description: Several PascalCase class/interface names and flow name appearing in s3 content are absent from s3 hints: "正常受信・正常応答" (the primary normal-operation flow name in the table), "Retryable" (interface that retry-eligible exceptions must implement), "ProcessAbnormalEnd" (exception class triggering abnormal termination), "ProcessStop" (exception class for normal process stop handling). A developer asking about any of these terms would not be routed to s3.
findings.source_evidence: Flow table row: 正常受信・正常応答; connectionerror/retryerror flows: "リトライ可能実行時例外(Retryableを実装した例外)"; abort flow: "ProcessAbnormalEnd"; termination flow: "プロセス停止要求(ProcessStop)"
